---
title: "Human HNSC datasets"
author: "M. Muzamil Khan"
date: "2023-07-21"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: hide
    theme: flatly
    toc: yes
    toc_float: true
  html_notebook:
    code_folding: hide
    theme: flatly
    toc: yes
    toc_float: true
  pdf_document:
    toc: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
.libPaths("/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/personal/mmkhan/R/4.1/")
PATH <- "/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/"
library(Seurat)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
```


## Process Choi dataset {.tabset .tabset-fade .tabset-pills}

Choi et al [https://www-nature-com.ezproxy.bu.edu/articles/s41467-023-36691-x#Abs1]

```{r eval=F}
count_data <- read.table(file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/leuko_choi/GSE181919_UMI_counts.txt.gz"))
meta_data <-  read.table(file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/leuko_choi/GSE181919_Barcode_metadata.txt.gz"))
rownames(meta_data) <- gsub(x = rownames(meta_data), pattern = "-", replacement = ".")

choi_seurat <- Seurat::CreateSeuratObject(counts = count_data, meta.data = meta_data)
 
# subsets hpv + and - datasets
choi_seurat_pos <- subset(choi_seurat, hpv == "HPV+")
choi_seurat_neg <- subset(choi_seurat, hpv == "HPV-")
```

### HPV negative dataset

```{r eval=F}
choi_seurat_neg <- PercentageFeatureSet(choi_seurat_neg, pattern = "^MT-", col.name = "percent.mt")
choi_seurat_neg <- NormalizeData(choi_seurat_neg, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 10000)
choi_seurat_neg <- FindVariableFeatures(choi_seurat_neg, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 5000)
all.genes <- rownames(choi_seurat_neg)
choi_seurat_neg <- ScaleData(choi_seurat_neg, all.genes)
```

Explained PC variance

```{r eval=F}
choi_seurat_neg <- SCTransform(choi_seurat_neg, vars.to.regress = "percent.mt", verbose = FALSE,  method = "glmGamPoi")
choi_seurat_neg <- RunPCA(choi_seurat_neg, verbose = FALSE)

ElbowPlot(choi_seurat_neg, reduction = "pca", ndims = 50)

mat <- Seurat::GetAssayData(choi_seurat_neg, assay = "RNA", slot = "scale.data")
pca <- choi_seurat_neg[["pca"]]

# Get the total variance:
total_variance <- sum(matrixStats::rowVars(mat))

eigValues = (pca@stdev)^2  ## EigenValues
varExplained = eigValues / total_variance
varExplained
sum(varExplained)
sum(varExplained[1:15])

```

```{r eval=F}
# run sctransform
choi_seurat_neg <- RunUMAP(choi_seurat_neg, dims = 1:15, verbose = FALSE)

choi_seurat_neg <- FindNeighbors(choi_seurat_neg, dims = 1:15, verbose = FALSE)
choi_seurat_neg <- FindClusters(choi_seurat_neg, verbose = FALSE, resolution = 0.4, random.seed = 1234, algorithm = "leiden")
saveRDS(choi_seurat_neg, file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_07_21_choi_seurat_neg.rds"))
```


### HPV negative epi. dataset

```{r eval=F}
choi_epi <- subset(choi_seurat_neg, cell.type %in% c('Epithelial.cells', 'Malignant.cells'))
table(choi_epi$tissue.type)
choi_epi <- subset(choi_epi, tissue.type %in% c("CA", "LP", "NL"))
```

```{r eval=F}
choi_epi <- PercentageFeatureSet(choi_epi, pattern = "^MT-", col.name = "percent.mt")
choi_epi <- NormalizeData(choi_epi, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 10000)
choi_epi <- FindVariableFeatures(choi_epi, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 5000)
all.genes <- rownames(choi_epi)
choi_epi <- ScaleData(choi_epi, all.genes)

choi_epi <- SCTransform(choi_epi, vars.to.regress = "percent.mt", verbose = FALSE,  method = "glmGamPoi")
choi_epi <- RunPCA(choi_epi, verbose = FALSE)

ElbowPlot(choi_epi, reduction = "pca", ndims = 50)

mat <- Seurat::GetAssayData(choi_epi, assay = "RNA", slot = "scale.data")
pca <- choi_epi[["pca"]]

# Get the total variance:
total_variance <- sum(matrixStats::rowVars(mat))

eigValues = (pca@stdev)^2  ## EigenValues
varExplained = eigValues / total_variance
varExplained
sum(varExplained)
sum(varExplained[1:15])

# run sctransform
choi_epi <- RunUMAP(choi_epi, dims = 1:15, verbose = FALSE)

choi_epi <- FindNeighbors(choi_epi, dims = 1:15, verbose = FALSE)
choi_epi <- FindClusters(choi_epi, verbose = FALSE, resolution = 0.3, random.seed = 1234, algorithm = "leiden")
saveRDS(choi_epi, file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_07_21_choi_seurat_neg_epi.rds"))
```

## Load dataset

```{r}
choi_epi <- readRDS(file = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/data/2023_07_21_choi_seurat_neg_epi.rds"))
choi_epi$cell_id <- rownames(choi_epi@meta.data)
choi_epi$tissue.type <- factor(choi_epi$tissue.type, levels = c("NL", "LP", "CA"))

DimPlot(choi_epi)
DimPlot(choi_epi, group.by = "cell.type")
DimPlot(choi_epi, group.by = "sample.id")
DimPlot(choi_epi, group.by = "tissue.type")
```
## Rel. Proportions

```{r}
rel_prop <- function(obj, cond1, cond2, cols=NULL) {
  meta_data <- obj@meta.data
  dat <- as.data.frame(prop.table(table(meta_data[,cond1], meta_data[,cond2]), margin = 1))
  colnames(dat) <- c(cond1, cond2, "percent")
  
  dat <- dat %>% 
  group_by_at(cond1) %>% 
  mutate(cluster_label_y = 1 - (cumsum(percent) - 0.5 * percent)) %>% 
  ungroup()
  
d1 <- ggplot(dat, aes_string(cond1, y = "percent", fill = cond2)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "identity") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  geom_text(aes(y = cluster_label_y, label = round(100 * percent, 2)), col="white", fontface="bold", size=3)+
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, margin=ggplot2::margin(5, b=10))) 

if(!is.null(cols)){ 
  d <- d1 +  scale_fill_manual(values = cols)
} else {
  d <- d1
}
d
}
```

```{r}
rel_prop_boxplot_choi <- function(obj, cond1, cond2) {
  meta_data <- obj@meta.data
  dat <- as.data.frame(prop.table(table(meta_data[,cond1], meta_data[,cond2]), margin = 1))
  colnames(dat) <- c(cond1, cond2, "number")
  #dat$tissue.type <- meta_data$tissue.type[match(dat$, meta_data$)]

d1 <- ggplot(dat, aes_string(x = cond1, y = "number", fill = cond2)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("gray", "red","salmon", "lightpink"))+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, margin=ggplot2::margin(5, b=10)), legend.position = "bottom") +
  ylab("%")
  
d1
}

```

```{r}
r1 <- rel_prop(obj = choi_epi, cond2 = "tissue.type", cond1 = "seurat_clusters", cols = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D"))
r1
```


## FCM 

not working properly since not all clusters have all samples

```{r eval=F}
library(parallel)
clusters <- levels(choi_epi$seurat_clusters)
famRes <- do.call(bind_rows, mclapply(clusters, function(clust) {

  clRes <- FindConservedMarkers(choi_epi,
                                ident.1 = clust,
                                grouping.var = "sample.id",
                                assay = "SCT",
                                meta.method = metap::maximump,
                                test.use = "MAST",
                                logfc.threshold = 0.25,
                                min.cells.group = 5,
                                only.pos = TRUE,
                                verbose = FALSE)

  if(nrow(clRes) > 0) {
    clRes <- data.frame(cluster = clust, gene = rownames(clRes), clRes)
  } else {
    clRes <- NULL
  }

  return(clRes)

}, mc.cores = 6))

rownames(famRes) <- NULL

# Fix column names
colnames(famRes) <- sub("minimump_", "maximump_", colnames(famRes))

# Fix false discovery rate
famRes$maximump_fdr <- p.adjust(famRes$maximump_p_val, method = "BH")

# Get minimum logFC
famRes$maximump_logFC <- apply(famRes[, grepl("avg_log2FC", colnames(famRes))],  1, min, na.rm = TRUE)

# Sort columns
firstCols <- c(1, 2,
  grep("maximump_", colnames(famRes)),
  grep("max_pval", colnames(famRes)))
lastCols <- seq(ncol(famRes))[!seq(ncol(famRes)) %in% firstCols]
famRes_mod <- famRes[, c(firstCols, lastCols)]

```

not all samples in each cluster, issue with completing

```{r eval=F}
famRes <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/07_21_fcm_choi_epi.rds"))
rownames(famRes) <- NULL

# Fix column names
colnames(famRes) <- sub("minimump_", "maximump_", colnames(famRes))

# Fix false discovery rate
famRes$maximump_fdr <- p.adjust(famRes$maximump_p_val, method = "BH")

# Get minimum logFC
famRes$maximump_logFC <- apply(famRes[, grepl("avg_log2FC", colnames(famRes))],  1, min, na.rm = TRUE)

# Sort columns
firstCols <- c(1, 2,
  grep("maximump_", colnames(famRes)),
  grep("max_pval", colnames(famRes)))
lastCols <- seq(ncol(famRes))[!seq(ncol(famRes)) %in% firstCols]
famRes_mod <- famRes[, c(firstCols, lastCols)]

# write.csv(famRes_mod, file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/07_21_fcm_choi_epi.csv"), quote = F)
```

## FindAllMarkers 

```{r eval=F}
#fam <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/07_24_fam_choi_epi.rds"))
fam <- FindAllMarkers(object = choi_epi,   assay = "SCT", test.use = "MAST", logfc.threshold = 0.25, only.pos = TRUE)
rownames(fam) <- NULL
#saveRDS(fam, file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/cluster_markers_choi_epi.rds"))
```

```{r}
fam <- readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/cluster_markers_choi_epi.rds"))
fam[fam$gene %in% c("JUN", "FOS", "JUNB", "FOSB", "FOSL1", "TCF4", "CEACAM1"), ]

fam %>%
    group_by(cluster) %>%
    filter(p_val_adj <= 0.05) %>%
    top_n(n = 50, wt = avg_log2FC) -> top20

top20

```

```{r}
gsvaViolinplot <- function(gsvaData, textsize, eset, title) {
  gsvaResT <- data.frame(t(gsvaData))
  condition <- 'Class'
  cond <- apply(pData(cpm_eset)[, "Class",drop = FALSE],1, paste, collapse = "_")
  gsvaResT[, paste(condition, collapse = "_")] <- cond
  gsvaResFlat <- reshape2::melt(gsvaResT, id.vars = paste(condition,
                                                          collapse = "_"),
                                variable.name = "pathway")
  ggplot2::ggplot(gsvaResFlat, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = paste(condition, collapse = "_"), y = "value",
    color = paste(condition, collapse = "_"))) +
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot() +
  #   scale_color_npg(alpha = 0.8)+
  # scale_fill_npg(alpha = 0.7)+
  ggplot2::geom_jitter(size=0.3) +
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(~pathway, scale = "free_y",
                        ncol = ceiling(sqrt(nrow(gsvaData)))) +
    ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova",  label = 'p.format')+
    ggplot2::theme(strip.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = textsize))+
    ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))+
    labs(title = title, y = "GSVA Score", x = "Class")+
    ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "red")+
    theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 10), axis.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"))
}

```


## GSVA on stress sigs

```{r}
gsva_boxplot <- function(df, group, nc, cls) {
print(group)
gsvaResT <- df[, colnames(df) %in% c(cls, paste(group))]
condition <- group 
cond <- as.list(gsvaResT[, condition ,drop = FALSE])
gsvaResT[, paste(condition, collapse = "_")] <- cond
gsvaResFlat <- reshape2::melt(gsvaResT, id.vars = paste(condition,
                                                          collapse = "_"),
                                variable.name = "pathway")
gsvaResFlat$pathway <- factor(gsvaResFlat$pathway, levels = cls)
g1 <-  ggplot2::ggplot(gsvaResFlat, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = "pathway", y = "value",
    color = "pathway")) +
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova",  label = 'p.format', vjust = 0.75)+
    ggplot2::theme_bw()+
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(as.formula(paste("~",group)), scales = "free_y", ncol = nc) +
    ggplot2::theme(strip.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10))+
    ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8))+
    ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "red")+
    ggplot2::theme(legend.position="none")+
    ggplot2::ylab("GSVA Score")
g1
}
```


```{r}
gsva_res_bern <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_07_24_choi_epi_bern_sigs.rds"))))

gsva_res_bern$tissue.type <- choi_epi$tissue.type[match(rownames(gsva_res_bern), choi_epi$cell_id)]
gsva_res_bern$seurat_clusters <- choi_epi$seurat_clusters[match(rownames(gsva_res_bern), choi_epi$cell_id)]
```

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=12}
gsva_boxplot(df=gsva_res_bern, group = "seurat_clusters",nc = 7, cls = c("Cell_Cycle",  "pEMT", "Epithelial_Differentiation_1", "Epithelial_Differentiation_2", "Stress", "Hypoxia", "seurat_clusters"))
gsva_boxplot(df=gsva_res_bern, group = "tissue.type", nc = 4, cls = c("Cell_Cycle",  "pEMT", "Epithelial_Differentiation_1", "Epithelial_Differentiation_2", "Stress", "Hypoxia", "tissue.type"))
```

## GSVA on 4nqo sigs

```{r}
gsva_res <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_07_24_choi_epi_4nqo_sigs.rds"))))

gsva_res$nqo_diff_up_dn <- gsva_res$nqo.vs.ctrl.up - gsva_res$nqo.vs.ctrl.dn
gsva_res$nqo_diff_dn_up <- gsva_res$nqo.vs.ctrl.dn - gsva_res$nqo.vs.ctrl.up
gsva_res$e7386_25_diff <- gsva_res$e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn - gsva_res$e7386_25.vs.nqo.up
gsva_res$e7386_50_diff <- gsva_res$e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn - gsva_res$e7386_50.vs.nqo.up

gsva_res <- gsva_res[, c("nqo.vs.ctrl.up", "e7386_25.vs.nqo.up", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.up", "nqo.vs.ctrl.dn", "e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn", "nqo_diff_up_dn", "nqo_diff_dn_up", "e7386_25_diff", "e7386_50_diff")]

gsva_res$tissue.type <- choi_epi$tissue.type[match(rownames(gsva_res), choi_epi$cell_id)]
gsva_res$seurat_clusters <- choi_epi$seurat_clusters[match(rownames(gsva_res), choi_epi$cell_id)]
#gsva_res$ <- choi_epi$new_epi_sub[match(rownames(gsva_res), choi_epi$cell_id)]
```

All clusters

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=12}

gsva_boxplot(df=gsva_res, group = "seurat_clusters",nc = 7, cls =  c("nqo.vs.ctrl.up", "e7386_25.vs.nqo.up", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.up", "nqo.vs.ctrl.dn", "e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn", "nqo_diff_up_dn", "nqo_diff_dn_up", "e7386_25_diff", "e7386_50_diff"))
gsva_boxplot(df=gsva_res, group = "tissue.type", nc = 4, cls = c("nqo.vs.ctrl.up", "e7386_25.vs.nqo.up", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.up", "nqo.vs.ctrl.dn", "e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn", "nqo_diff_up_dn", "nqo_diff_dn_up", "e7386_25_diff", "e7386_50_diff"))

```
## Selected clusters {.tabset .tabset-fade .tabset-pills}

### High stress

```{r}
gsva_res_bern_high <- gsva_res_bern %>% filter(seurat_clusters %in% c(7,8,9,10))
gsva_boxplot(df=gsva_res_bern_high, group = "seurat_clusters", nc = 7, cls = c("Cell_Cycle",  "pEMT", "Epithelial_Differentiation_1", "Epithelial_Differentiation_2", "Stress", "Hypoxia", "seurat_clusters"))
gsva_boxplot(df=gsva_res_bern_high, group = "seurat_clusters", nc = 7, cls = c("Stress", "seurat_clusters"))
gsva_boxplot(df=gsva_res_bern_high, group = "tissue.type", nc = 7, cls = c("Stress"))

gsva_res_high <- gsva_res %>% filter(seurat_clusters %in% c(7,8,9,10))

gsva_boxplot(df=gsva_res_high, group = "seurat_clusters", nc = 7, cls =  c("nqo.vs.ctrl.up",   "e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn", "nqo_diff_up_dn", "e7386_25_diff", "e7386_50_diff"))
```

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=12}
gsva_boxplot_nofw <- function(df, group, nc, cls) {
print(group)
gsvaResT <- df[, colnames(df) %in% c(cls, paste(group))]
condition <- group 
cond <- as.list(gsvaResT[, condition ,drop = FALSE])
gsvaResT[, paste(condition, collapse = "_")] <- cond
gsvaResFlat <- reshape2::melt(gsvaResT, id.vars = paste(condition,
                                                          collapse = "_"),
                                variable.name = "pathway")
gsvaResFlat$pathway <- factor(gsvaResFlat$pathway, levels = cls)
g1 <-  ggplot2::ggplot(gsvaResFlat, ggplot2::aes_string(
    x = "pathway", y = "value",
    color = "pathway")) +
    ggplot2::geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
    ggpubr::stat_compare_means(method = "anova",  label = 'p.format', vjust = 0.75)+
    ggplot2::theme_bw()+
    ggplot2::facet_wrap(as.formula(paste("~",group)), scales = "free_y", ncol = nc) +
    ggplot2::theme(strip.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10))+
    ggplot2::theme(axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8))+
    ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "red")+
    ggplot2::theme(legend.position="none")+
    ggplot2::ylab("GSVA Score")
g1
}

gsva_boxplot_nofw(df=gsva_res_high, group = "tissue.type", nc = 7, cls =  c("nqo.vs.ctrl.up",   "e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn", "nqo_diff_up_dn", "e7386_25_diff", "e7386_50_diff"))
gsva_boxplot_nofw(df=gsva_res_high, group = "tissue.type", nc = 7, cls =  c( "e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn", "Stress"))
```



### Low stress

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=12}
gsva_res_bern_low <- gsva_res_bern %>% filter(seurat_clusters %in% c(4,5,11,12,13))
gsva_boxplot(df=gsva_res_bern_low, group = "seurat_clusters",nc = 7, cls = c("Cell_Cycle",  "pEMT", "Epithelial_Differentiation_1", "Epithelial_Differentiation_2", "Stress", "Hypoxia", "seurat_clusters"))


gsva_res_low <- gsva_res %>% filter(seurat_clusters %in% c(4,5,11,12,13))
gsva_boxplot(df=gsva_res_low, group = "seurat_clusters",nc = 7, cls =  c("nqo.vs.ctrl.up",  "e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn", "nqo_diff_up_dn", "e7386_25_diff", "e7386_50_diff"))
```


```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=12}
gsva_boxplot(df=gsva_res, group = "seurat_clusters",nc = 7, cls =  c("nqo.vs.ctrl.up", "e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn", "nqo_diff_up_dn", "e7386_25_diff", "e7386_50_diff"))
gsva_boxplot(df=gsva_res, group = "tissue.type", nc = 4, cls = c("nqo.vs.ctrl.up", "e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn", "nqo_diff_up_dn", "e7386_25_diff", "e7386_50_diff"))
```
## Clust 4/11 sigs from 4nqo

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=12}
gsva_res_stress <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_07_25_choi_epi_stress411_sigs.rds"))))
gsva_res_stress$tissue.type <- choi_epi$tissue.type[match(rownames(gsva_res_stress), choi_epi$cell_id)]
gsva_res_stress$seurat_clusters <- choi_epi$seurat_clusters[match(rownames(gsva_res_stress), choi_epi$cell_id)]

gsva_boxplot(df=gsva_res_stress, group = "seurat_clusters",nc = 7, cls =  c("clust4_w11", "clust11_w4", "clust4_wo11", "clust11_wo4"))
gsva_boxplot(df=gsva_res_stress, group = "tissue.type", nc = 4, cls =  c("clust4_w11", "clust11_w4","clust4_wo11", "clust11_wo4"))
```

## Stress and b-cat/cbp activity {.tabset .tabset-fade .tabset-pills}

### Corr. heatmap

```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
df_bern_nqo <- cbind(gsva_res, gsva_res_bern)
df_bern_nqo <- df_bern_nqo[, !colnames(df_bern_nqo) %in% c('tissue.type', "seurat_clusters")]


library(corrplot)
mat1 <- as.matrix(df_bern_nqo[,c('Stress')])
mat2 <- as.matrix(df_bern_nqo[,colnames(df_bern_nqo) %in% colnames(gsva_res)])

colnames(mat1) <- c('Stress')
cor_mat <- cor(mat1, mat2)

corrplot::corrplot(corr = t(cor_mat), is.corr = T, method = "circle", addCoef.col ='black', col = COL1("YlOrRd"))
```

### Corr. scatter [Figure 4B]

```{r fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
scatter_wrap <- function (df, x, y, size) {
  sp1 <- ggpubr::ggscatter(df, x = x, y = y, add = "reg.line", size = size,# Add regressin line
   add.params = list(color = "red", fill = "lightgray"), # Customize reg. line
   conf.int = TRUE # Add confidence interval
)
# Add correlation coefficient
sp1 +  ggpubr::stat_cor(method = "pearson") 
}

corr_wrap <- function(df, x, y, names_x, names_y, type, diag) {
  library(corrplot)
  mat1 <- as.matrix(df[,x])
  mat2 <- as.matrix(df[,y])

  colnames(mat2) <- names_y
  colnames(mat1) <- names_x
  cor_mat <- cor(mat1, mat2)

  corrplot::corrplot(corr = (cor_mat), is.corr = T, method = "circle", addCoef.col ='black', col = COL1("YlOrRd"), type = type, diag = diag)
}

s1 <- scatter_wrap(df = df_bern_nqo, x = "Stress", y = "e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", size = 0.1)
s2 <-scatter_wrap(df = df_bern_nqo, x = "Stress", y = "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn", size = 0.1)

s <- ggpubr::ggarrange(s1,s2, ncol = 2, nrow = 1)
s

#ggsave(plot = s, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/12_18_choi_stress_diffex.png"), width = 6, height = 3, dpi = 300)
```



```{r}
gsva_res_df_choi <- data.frame((df_bern_nqo))
gsva_res_df_choi$tissue <- choi_epi$tissue.type[match(colnames(choi_epi), rownames(gsva_res_df_choi))]
gsva_res_df_choi$seurat_clusters <- choi_epi$seurat_clusters[match(colnames(choi_epi), rownames(gsva_res_df_choi))]
```

## Arrange the cells by the Stress GSVA scores {.tabset .tabset-fade .tabset-pills}

![figure](/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_07_heatmap_stress_gsva_choi.png)


```{r eval=F}

gsva_res_df_choi_stress <- gsva_res_df_choi[, c("Stress", "tissue", "seurat_clusters")]
#gsva_res_df_stress %>% arrange(.by_group = "Stress")

#gsva_res_df_stress[order(gsva_res_df_stress$Stress, decreasing = T), ]

stress_mat_choi <- as.matrix(gsva_res_df_choi_stress$Stress)
rownames(stress_mat_choi) <- rownames(gsva_res_df_choi_stress)
colnames(stress_mat_choi) <- "Stress"

# by seurat clusters
top_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(tissue = gsva_res_df_choi_stress$tissue,
                            clusters = gsva_res_df_choi_stress$seurat_clusters,
                            col = list(tissue = c("NL" = "white",
                                                     "LP" = "pink",
                                                     "CA" = "black")))

png(filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_07_heatmap_stress_gsva_choi.png"),   
    width     = 20,
    height    = 5,
    units     = "in",
    res       = 200,
    pointsize = 4)
ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(t(stress_mat_choi), name = "GSVA",
                        top_annotation = top_ha, show_row_names = F, 
                        show_column_names = F,  
                        clustering_distance_rows ="euclidean",
                        clustering_method_rows="ward.D", 
                        column_split=gsva_res_df_choi_stress$seurat_clusters)
dev.off()
```


```{r}
gsva_res_bern <- data.frame(t(readRDS(file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/2023_07_24_choi_epi_bern_sigs.rds"))))

gsva_res_bern$tissue.type <- choi_epi$tissue.type[match(rownames(gsva_res_bern), choi_epi$cell_id)]
gsva_res_bern$seurat_clusters <- choi_epi$seurat_clusters[match(rownames(gsva_res_bern), choi_epi$cell_id)]
```

## High Stress Clusters

```{r}
gsva_res_bern_mod <- gsva_res_bern
gsva_res_bern_mod <- gsva_res_bern_mod[order(gsva_res_bern_mod$Stress),,drop=F]

gsva_res_bern_mod$cell <- rownames(gsva_res_bern_mod)
ggplot(data = gsva_res_bern_mod, aes(x=cell, y = Stress, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())



gsva_res_high$Stress <- gsva_res_bern_mod$Stress[rownames(gsva_res_bern_mod) %in% rownames(gsva_res_high)]
gsva_res_high$cell <- rownames(gsva_res_high)
gsva_res_high_stress <- gsva_res_high[,c('Stress', 'tissue.type', "seurat_clusters", 'cell')]
gsva_res_high_stress <- gsva_res_high_stress[order(gsva_res_high_stress$Stress),,drop=F]



# ordered first
ggplot(data = gsva_res_high_stress, aes(x=cell, y=Stress, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#619CFF", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#619CFF", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())

# reordered
ggplot(data = gsva_res_high_stress, aes(reorder(cell, Stress), y = Stress, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#619CFF", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#619CFF", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())

# seurat clusters
g <- ggplot(data = gsva_res_high_stress, aes(reorder(cell, Stress), y = Stress, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters, ncol = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#619CFF", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#619CFF", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.title.x = element_blank())
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_14_gsva_stress_high_clusts.png"), width = 4, height = 3, dpi = 200)

# tissue type
g <- ggplot(data = gsva_res_high, aes(x=cell, y = Stress, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters, ncol = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#619CFF", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#619CFF", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.title.x = element_blank())
g

g <- ggplot(data = gsva_res_high, aes(reorder(cell, Stress), y=Stress, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters, ncol = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#619CFF", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#619CFF", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.title.x = element_blank())
g



g <- ggplot(data = gsva_res_high, aes(reorder(cell, e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn), y = e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters, ncol = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#619CFF", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#619CFF", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.title.x = element_blank())+NoLegend()
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_14_gsva_stress_high_clusts_e73_25_dn.png"), width = 4, height = 3, dpi = 200)

g <- ggplot(data = gsva_res_high, aes(reorder(cell, e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn), y = e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters, ncol = 4) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#619CFF", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#619CFF", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.title.x = element_blank())+NoLegend()
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_14_gsva_stress_high_clusts_e73_50_dn.png"), width = 4, height = 3, dpi = 200)
```
```{r}
gsva_res_high$Stress <- gsva_res_bern_mod$Stress[rownames(gsva_res_bern_mod) %in% rownames(gsva_res_high)]
gsva_res_high_stress <- gsva_res_high[,c('Stress', 'tissue.type', "seurat_clusters", "cell")]


# sel_order <- gsva_res_high_stress %>% 
#   arrange(desc(Stress)) 
# 
# sel_order$cell <- factor(sel_order$cell)
# 
# ggplot(data = sel_order, aes(x = cell, y=Stress, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
#   geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
#   scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
#   theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())
# 
# gsva_res_high_stress$cell <- factor(gsva_res_high_stress$cell)
# ggplot(data = gsva_res_high_stress, aes(x = cell, y=Stress, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
#   geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
#   scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
#   scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
#   theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())


data3 <- gsva_res_high                                              # Replicate original data
data3$cell <- factor(data3$cell,                                    # Factor levels in decreasing order
                  levels = data3$cell[order(data3$Stress, decreasing = F)])

# by tissue type
ggplot(data = data3, aes(x = cell, y=Stress, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 10e-10) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())


ggplot(data = data3, aes(x = cell, y=e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 10e-10) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())

ggplot(data = data3, aes(x = cell, y=e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  width = 10e-10) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())

# facet by clusters

g <- ggplot(data = data3, aes(x = cell, y=Stress, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 10e-10) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
    facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters, ncol = 4)+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank()) + NoLegend()
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_18_gsva_stress_high_clusts.png"), width = 4, height = 3, dpi = 200)

g <- ggplot(data = data3, aes(x = cell, y=e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 10e-10) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters,  ncol = 4)+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())+ NoLegend()
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_18_gsva_stress_high_clusts_e73_25.png"), width = 4, height = 3, dpi = 200)

g <- ggplot(data = data3, aes(x = cell, y=e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  width = 10e-10) +
    facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters,  ncol = 4)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())+ NoLegend()
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_18_gsva_stress_high_clusts_e73_50.png"), width = 4, height = 3, dpi = 200)


# correlation

g <- ggplot(data = gsva_res_high, aes(y = e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn, x=Stress)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(aes(col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  ggpubr::stat_cor(method = "pearson", cor.coef.name = c("R"), aes(label = ..r.label..))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
    facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters, ncol = 5)+ NoLegend()
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_21_gsva_stress_high_clusts_stress_e73_25.png"), width = 8, height = 3, dpi = 200)

g <- ggplot(data = gsva_res_high, aes(y = e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn,x=Stress)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(aes(col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  ggpubr::stat_cor(method = "pearson", cor.coef.name = c("R"), aes(label = ..r.label..))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
    facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters, ncol = 5)+ NoLegend()
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_21_gsva_stress_high_clusts_stress_e73_50.png"), width = 8, height = 3, dpi = 200)

```
```{r}
gsva_res_high_ca <- gsva_res_high %>% filter(tissue.type=="CA")
gsva_res_high_lp <- gsva_res_high %>% filter(tissue.type=="LP")
gsva_res_high_nl <- gsva_res_high %>% filter(tissue.type=="NL")


table(gsva_res_high_ca$Stress > 0 & gsva_res_high_ca$e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn > 0)
table(gsva_res_high_ca$Stress > 0 & gsva_res_high_ca$e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn > 0)

table(gsva_res_high_lp$Stress > 0 & gsva_res_high_lp$e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn > 0)
table(gsva_res_high_lp$Stress > 0 & gsva_res_high_lp$e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn > 0)


table(gsva_res_high_nl$Stress > 0 & gsva_res_high_nl$e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn > 0)
table(gsva_res_high_nl$Stress > 0 & gsva_res_high_nl$e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn > 0)
```




## Low Stress Clusters

```{r}
gsva_res_low$Stress <- gsva_res_bern$Stress[rownames(gsva_res_bern_mod) %in% rownames(gsva_res_low)]
gsva_res_low$cell <- rownames(gsva_res_low)

data3 <- gsva_res_low                                                 # Replicate original data
data3$cell <- factor(data3$cell,                                    # Factor levels in decreasing order
                  levels = data3$cell[order(data3$Stress, decreasing = F)])


# facet by clusters

g <- ggplot(data = data3, aes(x = cell, y=Stress, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 10e-10) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
    facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters, ncol = 5)+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank()) + NoLegend()
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_18_gsva_stress_low_clusts.png"), width = 5, height = 3, dpi = 200)

g <- ggplot(data = data3, aes(x = cell, y=e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 10e-10) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters,  ncol = 5)+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())+ NoLegend()
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_18_gsva_stress_low_clusts_e73_25.png"), width = 5, height = 3, dpi = 200)

g <- ggplot(data = data3, aes(x = cell, y=e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  width = 10e-10) +
    facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters,  ncol = 5)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank())+ NoLegend()
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_18_gsva_stress_low_clusts_e73_50.png"), width = 5, height = 3, dpi = 200)


## correlation
g <- ggplot(data = gsva_res_low, aes(y = e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn, x=Stress)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(aes(col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
    ggpubr::stat_cor(method = "pearson", cor.coef.name = c("R"), aes(label = ..r.label..))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
    facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters, ncol = 5)+ NoLegend()
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_21_gsva_stress_low_clusts_stress_e73_25.png"), width = 10, height = 3, dpi = 200)
g <- ggplot(data = gsva_res_low, aes(y = e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn,x=Stress)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(aes(col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
   ggpubr::stat_cor(method = "pearson", cor.coef.name = c("R"), aes(label = ..r.label..))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
    facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters, ncol = 5)+ NoLegend()
g
#ggsave(plot = g, filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_21_gsva_stress_low_clusts_stress_e73_50.png"), width = 10, height = 3, dpi = 200)



sp1 <-  ggpubr::ggscatter(data =gsva_res_low, y = "e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn", x="Stress", add = "reg.line", size = 0.25,
                          add.params = list(color = "blue", fill = "lightgray"), 
                          conf.int = TRUE, fill = "tissue.type", color = "tissue.type")+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D"))+
  ggpubr::stat_cor(method = "pearson") +
  facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters, ncol = 5)
sp1


sp1 <-  ggpubr::ggscatter(data =gsva_res_low, y = "e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn", x="Stress", add = "reg.line", size = 0.25,
                          add.params = list(color = "blue", fill = "lightgray"), 
                          conf.int = TRUE, fill = "tissue.type", color = "tissue.type")+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D"))+
  ggpubr::stat_cor(method = "pearson") +
  facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters, ncol = 5)
sp1



```

## Correlation plots

```{r}
g <- ggplot(data = data3, aes(x = e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn, y=Stress, col=tissue.type, fill=tissue.type)) +
  ggplot2::geom_point() +
  ggpubr::stat_cor(method = "pearson", cor.coef.name = c("R"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "#00BA38", "#F8766D")) +
    facet_wrap(~seurat_clusters, ncol = 5)+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank()) + NoLegend()
g
```


## Leading edge analysis {.tabset .tabset-fade .tabset-pills}

main body - GE of maybe top 2000 genes
GSVA scores on top arranged by decreasing order for each cell
annotation on top - treatment 1st and then maybe seurat clusters
ann on right - correlation bar plot with names of only stress genes or color by 'stress' or not

### Heatmap on high stress clusters 

![figure](/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_14_heatmap_stress_gsva_choi_high_st.png){#id .class width=500 height=500px}
```{r eval=F}
`%ni%` <- Negate(`%in%`)

gsva_res_bern_high <- gsva_res_bern_high[order(gsva_res_bern_high$Stress, decreasing = T),,drop=FALSE]

choi_top_2k <- as.matrix(choi_epi@assays$SCT@data[choi_epi@assays$SCT@var.features[1:500], rownames(gsva_res_bern_high)])

# corr
choi_cor <- data.frame(cor(x = t(choi_top_2k), y = gsva_res_bern_high$Stress))
colnames(choi_cor) <- 'cor_stress'

choi_cor_mod <- data.frame(cor_stress=choi_cor[order(choi_cor$cor_stress, decreasing = T),,drop=FALSE])

# by seurat clusters
top_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(tissue = gsva_res_bern_high$tissue, 
                            Stress = anno_barplot(x = gsva_res_bern_high$Stress, beside = T, which = "column"),
                            #clusters = gsva_res_bern$seurat_clusters,
                            col = list(tissue = c("NL" = "black",
                                                     "LP" = "#00BA38",
                                                     "CA" = "#F8766D")))

# arrange rows by corr values
choi_top_2k_mod <- choi_top_2k[rownames(choi_cor_mod), ]
stress_genes <- c("JUN", "FOS", "FOSB", "JUNB", "FOSL1")

selected1 = which(rownames(choi_top_2k_mod) %in% stress_genes)
selected2 = which(rownames(choi_top_2k_mod) %ni% stress_genes)


png(filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_14_heatmap_stress_gsva_choi_high_st.png"),
width     = 10,
height    = 25,
units     = "in",
res       = 200,
pointsize = 4)
#top_bar_anno <- (t(gsva_res_bern %>% select('Stress')))
ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap((choi_top_2k_mod), name = "GSVA",
                        top_annotation = top_ha, 
                        show_column_names = F,  
                        cluster_columns = F, 
                        # clustering_distance_columns  ="euclidean",
                        # clustering_method_columns="ward.D",
                        cluster_rows = F) +
 rowAnnotation(link1 = anno_mark(at = selected1, 
                                link_width = unit(0, "mm"),
                                link_gp = gpar(lwd=0.1),
                                padding = unit(0, "mm"),
                                labels = rownames((choi_top_2k_mod))[selected1], side = "left",
                                labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3, 
                                                 fontface = "bold",
                                                 col = "red"
                                                 ))) +
   rowAnnotation(link2 = anno_mark(at = selected2, 
                                link_width = unit(0, "mm"),
                                link_gp = gpar(lwd=0.1),
                                padding = unit(0, "mm"),
                                labels = rownames((choi_top_2k_mod))[selected2], side = "left",
                                labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3, 
                                                 fontface = "bold",
                                                 col = "black"
                                                 ))) +
  rowAnnotation(corr = anno_barplot(x = choi_cor_mod$cor_stress))

dev.off()
```


### Heatmap on all cells, top 500

![figure](/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_18_heatmap_stress_gsva_choi_new_big.png){#id .class width=500 height=1500px}

```{r eval=F}
gsva_res_bern <- gsva_res_bern[order(gsva_res_bern$Stress, decreasing = T),,drop=FALSE]

choi_top_2k <- as.matrix(choi_epi@assays$SCT@data[choi_epi@assays$SCT@var.features[1:500], rownames(gsva_res_bern)])

# corr
choi_cor <- data.frame(cor(x = t(choi_top_2k), y = gsva_res_bern$Stress))
colnames(choi_cor) <- 'cor_stress'

choi_cor_mod <- data.frame(cor_stress=choi_cor[order(choi_cor$cor_stress, decreasing = T),,drop=FALSE])

# by seurat clusters
top_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(tissue = gsva_res_bern$tissue, 
                            Stress = anno_barplot(x = gsva_res_bern$Stress, beside = T, which = "column"),
                            clusters = gsva_res_bern$seurat_clusters,
                            col = list(tissue = c("NL" = "black",
                                                  "LP" = "#00BA38",
                                                  "CA" = "#F8766D"),
                                       clusters = c("1"="grey",
                                                    "2"="grey",
                                                    "3"="grey",
                                                    "4"="grey",
                                                    "5"="grey",
                                                    "6"="grey",
                                                    "7"="red",
                                                    "8"="green",
                                                    "9"="yellow",
                                                    "10"="black",
                                                    "11"="grey",
                                                    "12"="grey",
                                                    "13"="grey",
                                                    "14"="grey")))

# arrange rows by corr values
choi_top_2k_mod <- choi_top_2k[rownames(choi_cor_mod), ]
stress_genes <- c("JUN", "FOS", "FOSB", "JUNB")

selected1 = which(rownames(choi_top_2k_mod) %in% stress_genes)
selected2 = which(rownames(choi_top_2k_mod) %ni% stress_genes)

choi_top_2k_mod_scaled <- t(scale(t(choi_top_2k_mod)))

png(filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_18_heatmap_stress_gsva_choi_new_big.png"),
width     = 10,
height    = 20,
units     = "in",
res       = 400,
pointsize = 10)
#top_bar_anno <- (t(gsva_res_bern %>% select('Stress')))
ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap((choi_top_2k_mod_scaled), name = "GE",
                        top_annotation = top_ha, 
                        show_column_names = F,  
                        cluster_columns = F, 
                        # clustering_distance_columns  ="euclidean",
                        # clustering_method_columns="ward.D",
                        cluster_rows = F) +
 rowAnnotation(link1 = anno_mark(at = selected1, 
                                link_width = unit(0, "mm"),
                                link_gp = gpar(lwd=0.1),
                                padding = unit(0, "mm"),
                                labels = rownames((choi_top_2k_mod))[selected1], side = "left",
                                labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3, 
                                                 fontface = "bold",
                                                 col = "red"
                                                 ))) +
   rowAnnotation(link2 = anno_mark(at = selected2, 
                                link_width = unit(0, "mm"),
                                link_gp = gpar(lwd=0.1),
                                padding = unit(0, "mm"),
                                labels = rownames((choi_top_2k_mod))[selected2], side = "left",
                                labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 3, 
                                                 fontface = "bold",
                                                 col = "black"
                                                 ))) +
  rowAnnotation(corr = anno_barplot(x = choi_cor_mod$cor_stress))
dev.off()

```


### Heatmap on all cells, top 50

![figure](/restricted/projectnb/montilab-p/projects/oralcancer/4nqo/mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_18_heatmap_stress_gsva_choi_new_small.png){#id .class width=500 height=500px}

```{r eval=F}
gsva_res_bern <- gsva_res_bern[order(gsva_res_bern$Stress, decreasing = T),,drop=FALSE]

choi_top_2k <- as.matrix(choi_epi@assays$SCT@data[choi_epi@assays$SCT@var.features[1:500], rownames(gsva_res_bern)])

# corr
choi_cor <- data.frame(cor(x = t(choi_top_2k), y = gsva_res_bern$Stress))
colnames(choi_cor) <- 'cor_stress'

choi_cor_mod <- data.frame(cor_stress=choi_cor[order(choi_cor$cor_stress, decreasing = T),,drop=FALSE])

choi_cor_mod_small <- choi_cor_mod[1:50,, drop=F]

# by seurat clusters
top_ha <- HeatmapAnnotation(tissue = gsva_res_bern$tissue, 
                            Stress = anno_barplot(x = gsva_res_bern$Stress, beside = T, which = "column"),
                            clusters = gsva_res_bern$seurat_clusters,
                            col = list(tissue = c("NL" = "black",
                                                  "LP" = "#00BA38",
                                                  "CA" = "#F8766D"),
                                       clusters = c("1"="grey",
                                                    "2"="grey",
                                                    "3"="grey",
                                                    "4"="grey",
                                                    "5"="grey",
                                                    "6"="grey",
                                                    "7"="red",
                                                    "8"="green",
                                                    "9"="yellow",
                                                    "10"="black",
                                                    "11"="grey",
                                                    "12"="grey",
                                                    "13"="grey",
                                                    "14"="grey")))

# arrange rows by corr values
choi_top_2k_mod <- choi_top_2k[rownames(choi_cor_mod_small), ]
stress_genes <- c("JUN", "FOS", "FOSB", "JUNB")

selected1 = which(rownames(choi_top_2k_mod) %in% stress_genes)
selected2 = which(rownames(choi_top_2k_mod) %ni% stress_genes)

choi_top_2k_mod_scaled <- t(scale(t(choi_top_2k_mod)))
png(filename = file.path(PATH, "mmkhan_e7386/results/e7386_images/08_18_heatmap_stress_gsva_choi_new_small.png"),
width     = 10,
height    = 10,
units     = "in",
res       = 400,
pointsize = 10)
#top_bar_anno <- (t(gsva_res_bern %>% select('Stress')))
ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap((choi_top_2k_mod_scaled), name = "GE",
                        top_annotation = top_ha, 
                        show_column_names = F,  
                        cluster_columns = F, 
                        # clustering_distance_columns  ="euclidean",
                        # clustering_method_columns="ward.D",
                        cluster_rows = F) +
 rowAnnotation(link1 = anno_mark(at = selected1, 
                                link_width = unit(0, "mm"),
                                link_gp = gpar(lwd=0.1),
                                padding = unit(0, "mm"),
                                labels = rownames((choi_top_2k_mod))[selected1], side = "left",
                                labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, 
                                                 fontface = "bold",
                                                 col = "red"
                                                 ))) +
   rowAnnotation(link2 = anno_mark(at = selected2, 
                                link_width = unit(0, "mm"),
                                link_gp = gpar(lwd=0.1),
                                padding = unit(0, "mm"),
                                labels = rownames((choi_top_2k_mod))[selected2], side = "left",
                                labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, 
                                                 fontface = "bold",
                                                 col = "black"
                                                 ))) +
  rowAnnotation(corr = anno_barplot(x = choi_cor_mod_small$cor_stress))
dev.off()

data.frame(noquote(rownames(choi_top_2k_mod_scaled)))
```

## Regression on stress and b-cat/cbp activity {.tabset .tabset-fade .tabset-pills}

```{r}
gsva_res_final <- gsva_res
gsva_res_final$stress <- gsva_res_bern$Stress[match(rownames(gsva_res_final), rownames(gsva_res_bern))]
gsva_res_final$group <- ifelse(gsva_res_final$seurat_clusters %in% c(7,8,9,10), "high", "low")

gsva_res_final_sub <- gsva_res_final[gsva_res_final$seurat_clusters %in% c(4,5,11,12,13,7,8,9,10), ]
gsva_res_final_sub$group <- factor(gsva_res_final_sub$group, levels = c("low", "high"))

lm1 <- (lm(data = gsva_res_final_sub, formula = (stress ~ e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn + group)))
lm2 <- (lm(data = gsva_res_final_sub, formula = (stress ~ e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn + group)))

# interaction
lm3 <- (lm(data = gsva_res_final_sub, formula = (stress ~ e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn + group + e7386_25.vs.nqo.dn*group)))
lm4 <- (lm(data = gsva_res_final_sub, formula = (stress ~ e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn + group + e7386_50.vs.nqo.dn*group)))

summary(lm1)

library(gtsummary)
t1 <- tbl_regression(lm1)
t2 <- tbl_regression(lm2)
t3 <- tbl_regression(lm3)
t4 <- tbl_regression(lm4) 
tbl_merge(list(t1,t2), 
          tab_spanner = c("E7386@25 dn", "E7386@50 dn"))

tbl_merge(list(t3,t4), tab_spanner = c("E7386@25_dn*group", "E7386@50_dn*group"))

tbl_stack(list(t1,t2,t3,t4), group_header = c("E7386@25 dn", "E7386@50 dn", "E7386@25_dn*group", "E7386@50_dn*group")) %>% as_gt()
```
